message:
feat: implement provider writers, shell completions, and real-smoke pipeline

Major expansion of casr from read-only session discovery to full
bidirectional session resumption across Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini.

Provider writers (the novel part of casr):
- claude_code.rs: writes canonical IR back to Claude Code JSONL format
  at ~/.claude/projects/<hash>/<session-id>.jsonl with correct message
  envelope structure, tool_use/tool_result pairs, and timestamp fidelity
- codex.rs: writes to Codex JSONL at ~/.codex/sessions/YYYY/MM/DD/
  with rollout numbering, function_call/function_result mapping, and
  Codex-specific metadata preservation
- gemini.rs: writes to Gemini JSON at ~/.gemini/tmp/<hash>/chats/ with
  parts-based content structure, inline function declarations, and
  Gemini session envelope compliance

Pipeline enhancements:
- Atomic write semantics with rollback on verification failure
- Dry-run mode with detailed field-mapping diagnostics
- JSON and human-readable output formats for resume results
- Session filtering by provider, age, keyword, and content patterns

CLI additions:
- Shell completion generation via clap_complete (bash/zsh/fish/powershell)
- Enhanced resume subcommand with --dry-run, --format, --verify flags
- Version info enriched with build metadata via vergen-gix

Model layer:
- Extended CanonicalMessage with provider-specific extras preservation
- Added flatten_content and round-trip fidelity helpers
- Timestamp normalization across provider-specific epoch formats

New dependencies: clap_complete, assert_cmd, predicates, tempfile

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
